name: Goreng Pisang (Chinese Fried Bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice each banana lengthwise.
2. Sift the flours and add to water. Stir until it reaches a consistency of cream.
3. Add salt.
4. Heat oil and, when smoking, dip each piece of banana in the batter.
5. Shake off excess batter and lower into hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown and roll in brown sugar.
7. Serve with ice cream.
